name: loreweaver
description: AI-native persistent storytelling and memory platform

scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/api && npm run test:e2e --workspace=apps/web --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run test
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist node_modules
scripts.seed: docker compose exec api node dist/seed/index.js
